Interzenex MicrofinanceBack to home

Features

Everything you need to manage money globally — built into one secure platform.

Multi-Currency Accounts

Hold, send, and receive money in 140+ currencies. Your account automatically converts at real-time rates with no hidden markup.

Bank-Level Security

AES-256 encryption, biometric login support, and an Approval Code system that gate-keeps every high-volume transfer.

Instant Global Transfers

Transfer to any Interzenex Microfinance account instantly. External bank transfers are processed same business day.

Smart Debit Cards

Virtual and physical cards with real-time spend controls, instant freeze, international usage toggle, and custom daily limits.

Real-Time Analytics

Interactive dashboards, spending breakdowns by category, and balance projections to keep your finances in view.

Approval Code System

Admins set a daily transfer count per account. Once reached, an Approval Code is required — a genuine second layer of authorization.

Email OTP Login

Every login requires a fresh one-time passcode sent to your registered email, eliminating password-only attack vectors.

Full Transaction History

Every transfer, deposit, withdrawal, and bill payment logged with timestamps, amounts, counterparties, and status.

Instant Account Opening

Sign up in under 3 minutes. Choose your home country and base currency, and your accounts are ready immediately.

24/7 Support

Raise a support ticket from inside the app at any time. Our team reviews and responds to every request personally.
